hook.summary: High-satisfaction chain reaction in a match-3 puzzle.
hook.visual_action: A player matches items, triggering a cascade of tomatoes and hearts being cleared.

scene_flow: Match-3 board setup with tomatoes, hearts, and a polar bear character.
Player triggers a large combo, clearing multiple rows of items.
Board fills with mice characters and more tomatoes as the combo continues.
A rainbow power-up is activated, causing a screen-wide explosion of effects.
End card appears with the game logo and a 'PLAY NOW' call to action.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who enjoy satisfying, high-combo match-3 mechanics.
